title: Onboarding - Continue as guest
scenario: Continue as guest flow during onboarding leads to home screen after permissions and passcode handling on both Android and iOS
steps: 1. Launch the app on Android device
3. Allow or deny permissions when prompted
4. Observe the Poly Product Improvement Program popup
5. Dismiss the popup and verify navigation to the home screen
6. Launch the app on iOS device
8. Allow or deny permissions when prompted
10. Enter the iPhone passcode when prompted
11. Verify navigation to the home screen
expected: On Android: After tapping "Continue as guest" and allowing/denying permissions, the Poly Product Improvement Program popup appears, then the user is directed to the home screen. On iOS: After tapping "Continue as guest", allowing/denying permissions, responding to the location popup, and entering the iPhone passcode, the user is directed to the home screen.
